---
title: 'Guitar'
date: '2014-11-15T23:23:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '2855912104857854615'
blogger_filename: '/2014/11/guitar.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

<p dir=ltr>Connor won't sit still or listen so why try?</p>
<p dir=ltr>Tried to play worship songs, both guitar playing and voice felt awkward and terrible... Why try?</p>
